task V3E_001 {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 100ms
  readback relay1 expect 1
  halt
}

  set relay1 = 0

}

task V3E_095 {
  require cap(water_sensor)
  require cap(temperature_sensor)
  require cap(humidity_sensor)

  set water_sensor = 0
  wait 10ms

  set humidity_sensor = 0

  halt
